commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=af7757dd8a41f54a70013b2d706ad2d16b4febb1)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds queue-pressure fields to model fallback observations, records cron primary/fallback progress into detached task status, stops fallback candidate execution while the Gateway is draining, and adds production AI governance docs.

PR surface: Source +119, Tests +252, Docs +165. Total +536 across 16 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR-introduced review finding: source inspection shows the PR throws before each fallback candidate when Gateway drain is active, while current command-queue tests define that already-active tasks continue after markGatewayDraining. I did not execute the PR branch, so this is source-reproducible rather than locally reproduced.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human review is needed because the remaining blockers are contributor real behavior proof and a maintainer compatibility decision about Gateway-drain fallback semantics, not a standalone repair marker.

target.title: feat(cron): surface fallback progress
target.body:
## Summary

- Stop model fallback from starting or continuing while the Gateway is draining for restart/shutdown.
- Add queue pressure fields to model fallback observations and surface cron primary/fallback progress into detached task run status.
- Thread cron task run ids through manual/isolated execution and document the production AI governance checklist.

## Verification

- PASS: `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`
- PASS: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/model-fallback.test.ts src/process/command-queue.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run-executor.task-progress.test.ts` (3 shards, 111 tests)
- PASS: `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test.tsbuildinfo`
- PASS: `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/model-fallback.ts src/agents/model-fallback.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run-executor.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run-executor.task-progress.test.ts src/cron/service/ops.ts src/cron/service/timer.ts src/gateway/server-cron.ts src/agents/model-fallback-observation.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run.ts src/cron/service/state.ts src/process/command-queue.test.ts`
- PASS: `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD`
- PASS: `node scripts/docs-list.js`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Cron/background task status now receives primary model and fallback progress, including queue active/queued/draining causality; model fallback refuses to run while Gateway restart drain is active.

Real environment tested: Local macOS source checkout at `/private/tmp/openclaw-pr-87343-rebase`, PR branch rebased/cherry-picked onto `upstream/main` at `7385c611fcf3e696d2d7bb171905ac33522aad8f`, pushed as PR head `af7757dd8a41f54a70013b2d706ad2d16b4febb1`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`; `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/model-fallback.test.ts src/process/command-queue.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run-executor.task-progress.test.ts`; `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test.tsbuildinfo`; targeted `oxfmt --check`; `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD`; `node scripts/docs-list.js`.

Evidence after fix: Targeted tests passed with 3 Vitest shards and 111/111 tests, core test typecheck exited 0, targeted formatter exited 0, docs listing exited 0, and diff whitespace check exited 0.

Observed result after fix: The cron task-progress test records primary and fallback status updates; model fallback drain tests throw `GatewayDrainingError` before starting or continuing fallback; queue observation fields report active/queued/draining counts.

What was not tested: Full local `pnpm check:changed` and full GitHub CI were not run locally. After the latest push, GitHub reported this PR as `mergeable=true`; branch protection checks are still subject to the current GitHub workflow results.
target.author: riosbotchen-source
